Tests accelerometer data retrieval and displays changes, with metadata and build script for the Pebble app.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Tests accelerometer data retrieval and displays changes on a Pebble watch interface.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "Accelerometer Peek Test" app in the Pebble firmware, including version and UUID.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with JavaScript linting and platform-specific binaries.
